---
title: "Dr. Researcher Name"
subtitle: "Title and Affiliation"
image: images/profile.jpg
image-shape: rectangle
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:placeholder@university.edu
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/
    - icon: person-badge-fill
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/
---

Brief bio paragraph will go here. This is placeholder content that will be replaced with the author's real bio (2-3 sentences) covering academic background and affiliation.

## Research Interests

Research interests summary will go here. This placeholder will be replaced with 3-5 sentences describing the author's research interests in plain language accessible to both academic and non-academic readers.
